mapper.select: SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, employee.boss_role, employee.has_boss, employee.created_at, employee.updated_at, employee.email, boss.boss_id, boss_employee.name AS boss_name, boss_employee.employee_id AS boss_employee_id FROM employee LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates ON employee.employee_id = boss_subordinates.subordinate_id LEFT JOIN boss ON boss_subordinates.boss_id = boss.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee AS boss_employee ON boss.employee_id = boss_employee.employee_id WHERE employee.employee_id = #{employeeId}

SELECT e.employee_id, e.name, e.title, e.boss_role, e.has_boss, e.email, b.employee_id AS boss_id FROM employee e LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates bs ON e.employee_id = bs.subordinate_id LEFT JOIN boss b ON bs.boss_id = b.employee_id ORDER BY e.employee_id ASC

SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, boss.boss_id, be.name AS boss_name, be.employee_id AS boss_employee_id FROM employee LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates bs ON employee.employee_id = bs.subordinate_id LEFT JOIN boss ON bs.boss_id = boss.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee be ON boss.employee_id = be.employee_id

SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, employee.boss_role, employee.has_boss, employee.created_at, employee.updated_at, boss.boss_id, boss_employee.name AS boss_name, boss_employee.employee_id AS boss_employee_id FROM employee LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates ON employee.employee_id = boss_subordinates.subordinate_id LEFT JOIN boss ON boss_subordinates.boss_id = boss.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee AS boss_employee ON boss.employee_id = boss_employee.employee_id WHERE employee.employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee ( name, title, boss_role, has_boss, created_at, updated_at, username, password, email ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{title}, #{bossRole}, #{hasBoss}, NOW(), NOW(), #{username}, #{password}, #{email} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM boss_subordinates WHERE boss_id = #{bossId} AND subordinate_id = #{subordinateId}
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, title = #{title}, boss_role = #{bossRole}, has_boss = #{hasBoss}, updated_at = NOW(), username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email} WHERE employee_id = #{employee_id}
mapper.select: SELECT email from employee WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
